DURATION.HINT: How long this effect should last, in milliseconds
DURATION.LABEL: Duration

LABEL.HINT: A friendly name by which to list this effect
LABEL.LABEL: Label

START.HINT: At which point during this animation should this effect start
START.LABEL: Start

GMONLY.HINT: If enabled, then only the GM will execute this macro.  Otherwise, ALL connected users will.
GMONLY.LABEL: GM Only

BACKGROUNDONLY.HINT: When enabled, will only flash the background behind tokens/tiles/etc
BACKGROUNDONLY.LABEL: Background Only

COLOR.HINT: The color to flash the screen
COLOR.LABEL: Color

SCREENFLASH.DESCRIPTION: Flash the screen a given color
SCREENFLASH.NAME: Screen Flash

SHAKE.DESCRIPTION: What it says on the tin. Shake the placeable.
SHAKE.NAME: Shake

POSITION.HINT: If enabled, will cause sound to be played at this placeable's location
POSITION.LABEL: Play at Placeable

RADIUS.HINT: The radius at which the sound can be heard when playing at this placeable's locaiton
RADIUS.LABEL: Radius

VOLUME.HINT: The volume at which to play this sound
VOLUME.LABEL: Volume

SOUND.HINT: (Optional) Sound on the above playlist to play
SOUND.LABEL: Sound

TINT.DESCRIPTION: A simple efect to tint the placeable
TINT.NAME: Tint

TINT.HINT: The color to use to tint this placeable.  Use white to return it to its usual colors.
TINT.LABEL: Tint
